untranslatable_reason: This signal requires options-specific indicators (implied volatility, IV spread across strikes, option pricing models) that are not available in the provided indicator set. The strategy depends on: (1) IV spread calculation across strike prices, (2) estimated true volatility vs market consensus comparison, and (3) volatility arbitrage mechanics. None of these can be constructed from equity price/technical indicators alone. OHLCV and technical indicators cannot replicate options volatility term structure analysis.
translation_notes: NATENBERG_DRY_191_0 is a volatility arbitrage strategy from 'The Volatility Smile' requiring real-time options chain data and volatility surface modeling. The hvol_20 indicator available is historical volatility of underlying price only—insufficient for cross-strike IV comparison or single true volatility estimation needed for this options arbitrage rule.
